CREATE TABLE md5_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT md5_init() AS empty_context WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM md5_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT md5_init() AS nested_context FROM (SELECT data FROM md5_test WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT md5_init() AS join_context FROM md5_test JOIN (SELECT 1 AS id, 'test' AS data) AS join_table ON md5_test.id = join_table.id;
SELECT DISTINCT md5_init() AS distinct_context FROM md5_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT md5_init() FROM md5_test WHERE LENGTH(data) < 10;
SELECT md5_init() AS conditional_context FROM md5_test WHERE data LIKE '%data%' AND id IN (SELECT id FROM md5_test WHERE id > 1);
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, CONSTRAINT fk_ref FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES md5_test(id));
SELECT md5_init() FROM second_table WHERE ref_id IN (SELECT id FROM md5_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
